safety_note: This manifest stores planned tiny CoilSnake project edits, expected text-match counts, and promotion targets only; generated projects and rebuilt ROMs stay under ignored build/coilsnake.

planned_experiments.edit_description: Changed battle action 13 PP Cost from 98 to 99.
planned_experiments.promotion_target: Join CoilSnake battle action PP cost vocabulary to BATTLE_ACTION_TABLE field offsets and C2 PSI/action runtime consumers.

planned_experiments.edit_description: Changed PSI ability 4 Ness learned level from 75 to 76.
planned_experiments.promotion_target: Join CoilSnake PSI learn-level vocabulary to PSI_ABILITY_TABLE field offsets and menu/learn-check runtime consumers.

planned_experiments.edit_description: Changed enemy 1 Insane Cultist Action 1 from 215 to 216.
planned_experiments.promotion_target: Join CoilSnake enemy action-slot vocabulary to ENEMY_CONFIGURATION_TABLE field offsets and battle action dispatch consumers.

planned_experiments.edit_description: Changed NPC config 1 Text Pointer 1 from $c74c07 to $c74c08.
planned_experiments.promotion_target: Join CoilSnake NPC text pointer vocabulary to local map-object/actionscript text dispatch contracts.

planned_experiments.edit_description: Changed the first unique map door Destination X field from 784 to 785.
planned_experiments.promotion_target: Join CoilSnake map door destination vocabulary to local door/warp table ranges and map transition consumers.

planned_experiments.edit_description: Changed window configuration 8 Width from 30 to 31.
planned_experiments.promotion_target: Join CoilSnake window configuration vocabulary to E0/E1 UI/font/window contracts.
